TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Naim Frashëri kawas tay 1923, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 8, Naim Frashëri, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1975) mhtu sgu 1923 neng 8 gat 12 nici,ru1975 neng 2 gat 18 nici mhuqil.51 kawas kwara gutux niya .min hopa' balay lalu na pgiki na Arupaniya squ 20 seki hiya qani. pyang niya 'balay blaq qu giki'ing,ru aring kawas 1942 lga,t'aring mluw mtzyaw,ana ga pyang balay 'ringan kinbaq niya' pgiki' ga, misa t'ring sgu kawas1945.cingay balay pingiki niya squ pzyang balay galung pzyang na squliq.mspat kawra' pin'ega'niya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: naim *ras~ɕħ*ri kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, naim *ras~ɕħ*ri, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mħtu s~ɕɣu **** neŋ * ɣat ** niʦ~ʨi,ru**** neŋ * ɣat ** niʦ~ʨi mħuqil.** kawas~ɕ kwara ɣutux nija .min ħopaʔ βalaj lalu na pɣiki na arupanija s~ɕqu ** s~ɕeki ħija qani. pjaŋ nija ʔβalaj βlaq qu ɣikiʔiŋ,ru ariŋ kawas~ɕ **** lɣa,tʔariŋ mluw mtzjaw,ana ɣa pjaŋ βalaj ʔriŋan kinβaq nijaʔ pɣikiʔ ɣa, mis~ɕa tʔriŋ s~ɕɣu kawas~ɕ****.ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj piŋiki nija s~ɕqu pzjaŋ βalaj ɣaluŋ pzjaŋ na s~ɕquliq.ms~ɕpat kawraʔ pinʔeɣaʔnija. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Naim Frashëri kawas tay 1923, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 8, Naim Frashëri, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1975) mhtu sgu 1923 neng 8 gat 12 nici,ru1975 neng 2 gat 18 nici mhuqil.51 kawas kwara gutux niya .min hopa' balay lalu na pgiki na Arupaniya squ 20 seki hiya qani. pyang niya 'balay blaq qu giki'ing,ru aring kawas 1942 lga,t'aring mluw mtzyaw,ana ga pyang balay 'ringan kinbaq niya' pgiki' ga, misa t'ring sgu kawas1945.cingay balay pingiki niya squ pzyang balay galung pzyang na squliq.mspat kawra' pin'ega'niya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: naim *ras~ɕħ*ri kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, naim *ras~ɕħ*ri, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mħtu s~ɕɣu **** neŋ * ɣat ** niʦ~ʨi,ru**** neŋ * ɣat ** niʦ~ʨi mħuqil.** kawas~ɕ kwara ɣutux nija .min ħopaʔ βalaj lalu na pɣiki na arupanija s~ɕqu ** s~ɕeki ħija qani. pjaŋ nija ʔβalaj βlaq qu ɣikiʔiŋ,ru ariŋ kawas~ɕ **** lɣa,tʔariŋ mluw mtzjaw,ana ɣa pjaŋ βalaj ʔriŋan kinβaq nijaʔ pɣikiʔ ɣa, mis~ɕa tʔriŋ s~ɕɣu kawas~ɕ****.ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj piŋiki nija s~ɕqu pzjaŋ βalaj ɣaluŋ pzjaŋ na s~ɕquliq.ms~ɕpat kawraʔ pinʔeɣaʔnija. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
